ns0:entry.ns0:title: Egonex-AI/Understand-Anything
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Egonex-AI/Understand-Anything
Language: typescript
Graphs that teach > graphs that impress. Turn any code into an interactive knowledge graph you can explore, search, and ask questions about. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Copilot, Gemini CLI, and more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: SigNoz/signoz
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/SigNoz/signoz
Language: typescript
SigNoz is an open-source observability platform native to OpenTelemetry with logs, traces and metrics in a single application. An open-source alternative to DataDog, NewRelic, etc. 🔥 🖥. 👉 Open source Application Performance Monitoring (APM) & Observability tool

ns0:entry.ns0:title: TencentCloud/TencentDB-Agent-Memory
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/TencentCloud/TencentDB-Agent-Memory
Language: typescript
TencentDB Agent Memory delivers fully local long-term memory for AI Agents via a 4-tier progressive pipeline, with zero external API dependencies.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: browseros-ai/BrowserOS
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/browseros-ai/BrowserOS
Language: typescript
🌐 The open-source Agentic browser; alternative to ChatGPT Atlas, Perplexity Comet, Dia.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cline/cline
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cline/cline
Language: typescript
Autonomous coding agent as an SDK, IDE extension, or CLI assistant.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dream-num/univer
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dream-num/univer
Language: typescript
Univer is a full-stack framework for creating and editing spreadsheets / word processor / presentation on both web and server.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dyad-sh/dyad
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dyad-sh/dyad
Language: typescript
Local, open-source AI app builder for power users ✨ v0 / Lovable / Replit / Bolt alternative 🌟 Star if you like it!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: google-labs-code/stitch-skills
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/google-labs-code/stitch-skills
Language: typescript
A library of Agent Skills designed to work with the Stitch MCP server. Each skill follows the Agent Skills open standard, for compatibility with coding agents such as Antigravity, Gemini CLI, Claude Code, Cursor.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hcengineering/platform
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hcengineering/platform
Language: typescript
Huly — All-in-One Project Management Platform (alternative to Linear, Jira, Slack, Notion, Motion)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nestjs/nest
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nestjs/nest
Language: typescript
A progressive Node.js framework for building efficient, scalable, and enterprise-grade server-side applications with TypeScript/JavaScript 🚀

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nrwl/nx
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nrwl/nx
Language: typescript
The Monorepo Platform that amplifies both developers and AI agents. Nx optimizes your builds, scales your CI, and fixes failed PRs automatically. Ship in half the time.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: prisma/prisma
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/prisma/prisma
Language: typescript
Next-generation ORM for Node.js & TypeScript | PostgreSQL, MySQL, MariaDB, SQL Server, SQLite, MongoDB and CockroachDB

ns0:entry.ns0:title: puppeteer/puppeteer
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/puppeteer/puppeteer
Language: typescript
JavaScript API for Chrome and Firefox

ns0:entry.ns0:title: tailwindlabs/tailwindcss
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/tailwindlabs/tailwindcss
Language: typescript
A utility-first CSS framework for rapid UI development.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: wonderwhy-er/DesktopCommanderMCP
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/wonderwhy-er/DesktopCommanderMCP
Language: typescript
This is MCP server for Claude that gives it terminal control, file system search and diff file editing capabilities
